final:
module RefModule
(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [7:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 8'b00000000;
    end else begin
        count <= {count[6:0], ~count[7]};
    end
end

endmodule
